memory_cards.statement: Graph memory systems must preserve relationships between entities to enable contextual reasoning in agents.
Provenance tracking is essential for graph memory systems to maintain auditability and trust in stored knowledge.
Update semantics must be explicitly defined in graph memory systems to handle modifications without losing historical context.

details: Extracted core design principles for graph memory systems from the provided article.
Preserved ambiguity in relationships by avoiding over-simplification of predicates.
Excluded superseded/deleted facts as per strict durability requirements.
